title: Akkinnian Cloud
content:
The Akkinnian Cloud is the largest nebula found within the galaxy, though it stretches the bounds of what could be called a "nebula" to it's very extreme. It shares much more in common with the mysterious Lavender Mists found at the fringes of the Hydian Sector than a typical stellar nebula. The Cloud is a highly treacherous area of space to traverse, with the only stable paths being marked by the Akkinnian Beacons. Every single stellar object within the cloud is classified as a Class-1 Environmental Hazard, on par with a supernova or some black holes. 

Due to the extinction of the Akkinnians, the native population of the region, most information regarding the mysteries of the Cloud has been lost with them. What little is known from outside surveys only raises more questions; there is no evidence to show that the cloud ever functioned as a stellar nursery, as would be expected of a nebula of it's size. Perhaps the most notable aspect of the Cloud is it's how young of a structure it is; it is only visible from within ~15,000 light-years away. Observations made at the edges of it's visibility (showing the earliest records of the Cloud's existence) have yielded little, other than the knowledge that the cloud formed practically overnight, by stellar standards, at least.
